## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Build is green (`cargo test` + `npm run build`) and the touched tests pass.
- [ ] This is a **behaviour-preserving** change — or any behaviour change is isolated in its
      own tested commit.
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO ([CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)).
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and agree to the [CLA](../CLA.md)
      (recorded automatically on first PR).

## Attribution

Commits are attributed to their **human author only** — no AI / code-generation co-author or
"Generated by …" trailers (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)). PRs carrying such
trailers will be asked to remove them before merge.
